summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of gamified productivity app v2. Most features working correctly but found critical data persistence issue with date navigation.

critical_bugs.issue: Data persistence lost when navigating between dates - rewards disappear from shop, runes reset to 0, lifetime counters reset to 0
critical_bugs.affected_flow: Date navigation resets all user progress

ui_bugs.issue: Achievement progress text shows 0/20 and 0/500 instead of actual progress (1/20, 50/500)

passed_tests: Navigation tabs switch correctly between Mission Log, Reward Shop, Trophy Room
Anime character background visible on left side
Mission creation modal with all fields (name, rank, repeat)
Reward Shop - Create Reward modal with name, cost, color theme
Mission completion updates progress ring to 100%
Delete icon always visible on mission cards (no hover required)
Trophy Room displays all 8 achievements with lock icons
Runes system works correctly (earned 50 runes from B-Rank mission)
All UI components have proper data-testid attributes
Color themes work in reward creation
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical data persistence bug with date navigation - localStorage data is being lost/reset when user navigates between dates. This breaks the entire user experience as all progress (missions, rewards, runes, lifetime counters) gets reset. Also fix achievement progress display to show actual values instead of 0.
